strategy: This is a 37,105-health Challenge boss - bring a team with a hitter, support, and a utility wizard dedicated to clearing his hanging effects.
Hit Death. He resists only 29% Death versus 49% most schools and 69% Myth and Balance, so Death is your best route.
The core rule: he places a random Krok Ankh hanging effect on round 1 and every third round. If any Krok Ankh is still active when he dies, he heals to 100%.

Krok Ankhs only come off with spells or treasure cards that specifically clear that effect type - a Weakness Ankh will not clear from a self-damage spell, a Shield Ankh will not clear from a damage spell. Assign someone to carry the right removals for each.

Do not bother with Doom and Gloom or Infection on his revival - it is a max-percentage heal and ignores them. Instead clear every Krok Ankh, then land your funneled Death hit in a window when none are active.
cheatNotes: On round 1 and every third round after, he places a random Krok Ankh hanging effect - shield, trap, blade, heal-over-time, damage-over-time, or weakness - on himself or a random wizard.
Krok Ankhs only come off with spells or treasure cards that specifically clear that effect type; a Weakness Ankh will not clear from self-damage, and a Shield Ankh will not clear from a damage spell.
If he is defeated while any Krok Ankh is still active, he restores 100% of his health. Clear every Ankh before the kill.
That revival heal is a max-percentage heal, so Doom and Gloom and Infection cannot weaken it.
